S.FORM: == Cen Cuiyu == Cen Cuiyu (1917 miheca 2 folad 9 romi'ad – 1988 miheca 8 folad 20 romi'ad), pacimil a ngangan ci Rencing , aniniay Taywan kangkoho kiwiko a patirengay, masofoc i Canghua no Taywan a mala kangkohoay ato cisalongocay no finawlan sician onto tamdaw, o nai pikihatiya to pipatireng to Taywan daykako isingan kangkohopo, Taywan daykako kangkoho pitilidan, ta misafa'eloh i naikoran no kalalood Taywan kangkoho kiwiko a pifalic, nanoya, micikeroh patireng to salongoc a harateng "Polong no cikiw fafahiyan Taywan nikapolongan onto" (Women's Movement for Democracy in Taiwan) a kasawasil, ato mihapiw micoker to malatenokay Taywan kitakit sanay a sasowalan. O kacitaneng ningra katadamaan i isingan no Taywan a sarakatay minanam i daykako citamohong to kakosi no Taywan a kangkoho, ato sa'ayaway matahidang no hekalan isi kasawasil a Taywan a kangkoho tamdaw . Rayray no 'orip Ka'emangan Namisawad i Canghua kaucong i, kona awaay ho ko pasayraan no harateng to ikor i, saan na miliso' tayra ko faki i Xiamen; manengneng ko itiraay i Xiamen ko caayay ka korac ko liyok no niyaro', ta miketon pasiisi ko nisafaloco'an a dademakan . Ikor, tayra i Dipon ci Cen Cuiyu itira i Saint Luke fafahiyan kangkofo pitilidan, misawad i 1941 miheca itiya, o nika fangcal no nipitilid ni Cen Cuiyu mafana' saka lalicay to no Dipon ato Inkiris a sowal, saka mafo'ot padoedo itira i Dipon patadoay ko tayal, saan kana'ayen ningra to sapi nokayan tayni Taywan patadoay ko tayal ; midotoc to pipalita no citodongay i congtongfo, ci Cen Cuiyu nai 1942 miheca 1 folad tangasa 12 folad itira i Aiyu no Tokyo mikingkiway to kakomodan isi kangkofo Ka'ayaw kaikor no 228 a demakan Tono pinokay ni Cen Cuiyu tayni Taywan itira cingra i Pawcienkoan no Taypi a matayal , 1945 miheca 11 folad itira to cingra i Taywansio Taypi isingan kangkofo nicokeray kakeridan , toya mihecaan 3 folad mihayda ci Chen Yi to sapiocor a analal . Midotoc to sowal na Qiu Feixian aci Chen Cuiyu a sito ci Li Jinrongan i, 1947 miheca 2 folad fangafang k Taywan to 228 a demak, finawlan ato komintang a tapang masasi'ayaw itiya, saan ci Cen Cuiyu mipadang cingra to mamakari'angaw no citodongay tapang no komintang a papinapina tamdaw, nika ikor patodongen no citodongay pacomod i papatayen a ngangan ci Cen Cuiyu. Ikor ira ko caayay ka kahi a widang ato citodongay midemak a mipadangay, saka toya mihecaan saka 3 folad mipacarcar papiliyas to Taywan ci Cen Cuiyu a tayra i Canada milimek :27 . Midotoc to pipalita no citodongay i congtongfo, 1947 miheca 4 folad ci Chen Cuiyu citodong haca cingra to Taywansio pinanaman komod a malasingsi tanfasa toya miheca 9 folad . Itiya ci Chen Cuiyu i 1947 miheca 9 folad tangasa 1948 miheca 6 folad mitilid i daykako no Toronto no Canada to kangkofo citodongay kiwikoka pakaala to kompay , ikor minokay tayni Taywan cingra padoedo matayal i Taypi isingan kangkofo micokeray tangasa 1949 miheca 1 folad, toya miheca 2 folad patiko tayra i Pawcienkoan no Taypi a matayal to kangkofo kakeridan tangsa 12 folad, toya saka 7 folad mala citodongay no kitakit Taywan daykako isingkakoyin patirengan ising kangkofo kakeridan . Tawan daykako kangkofo pitilidan I 'ayaw no kacitodong ni Chen Cuiyu to kakeridan no kangkofo nao minanamay to kiwikono Padaka; misitapang to saki Tayta isingan ato kangkofo a kiwiko ato sapifalic to lalekoen, halo pipatireng to Tayta isingan kangkofopo, misafaeloh mitelek to patodong no matayalay a kasasiiked no isingan, paisingan taliyok isi kacakat, patongal to kafoti'an no kasofocan ato wawa a rawang masafa'eloh ko kahiraan lalekoen a demak :39-45 Ikoran tiya a Tayta kakeridan ci Fu Sinian kociw mahemek to 'icel ni Chen Cuiyu, nanoya ci Chen Cuiyu i 1950 miheca patireng to kitakit Taywan daykako isi kakoyin pakapi to takaraway kangkofo tayal pitilidan (Tayta fosiw), patorod cingraan sa'ayaway kociw , 1950 miheca 7 folad miteka ci Chen Cuiyu citodong mala liciciw no Taywanko kangkofo konghuy . 1951 miheca komintang miocor tayra i Tayta kangkofo pitilidan malaciawkoan ci Liu Shuzhang fafahiyan; nawhani no tekedan a demak pacomoden ko no sofitay ato teked pikowan i pitilidan, tahaikor caay to kasasinga'ay aci Chen Cuiyu ko harateng :92 . 1952 miheca 10 folad ci Chen Cuiyu mala kapolongan wiyin no Conghua fafahiyan miliyangay to kongcantang , 1954 miheca tayra cingra i Boston daykako no Amilika pakaala to kangkofo dademakan sosi a todong :138. Ikor i 1956 miheca ci Liu Shuzhang mitakaw mitahidang to mangahay tilid, mimangah ci Chen Cuiyuan pakokot to mikelot a raraw, nanoya ci Chen Cuiyu matefoc no hoyin mapalasawad ko tayal marofo :124. Tahaikor talacowa mapalasawad to no takaraway hoyin ko kaawa no raraw a wacay ni Chen Cuiyu, nika mapasemer cingra saka miliyas to Taywan tayra i Padaka . Oya Tayta kangkofo pitilidan i piliyas to ni Chen Cuiyu mapaherek ko kacitodong no pitilidan . Papotalay no kitakit a onto Maliyaw haca ci Chen Cuiyu to Taywan tayra i sasifo'ay no Amilika, o pipadang no hakal isi sakapot citodong to itiraay kitakit a isi komong, halafin ko aro' ningra itira i Puerto Rico . Itira i hakal isi sakapot a patado ira ko 18 mihecaan, o sapatodong a tayal lekakawa ci Chen Cuiyuan talacowa caay pikihatiya to papotalay no kitakit a kasacitodongay sakapot onto :160, nika itiraay i Puerto Rico a finawlan misa'icel to sapisiikedan a demak saka cifaloco' micoker to misatataday patireng to kitakit no Taywan . 1980 miheca nai hakal isi sakapot a misawad ko tayal, ci Chen Cuiyu misitapang mikihatiya no Taywan citodongay nikapolongan a demak, ato mikihatiya to Taywan saniyaro' kakomodan yofayof :160-161. Itiya i 1985 miheca ato i Hawaii ko ao' ci Kogeorgi masasiparapic, papitilid to pakayniay to Taywan likisi a tilidan, itiya ci Kogeorgi tatiih to ko tireng ningra a ci Chen Cuiyu ko mikotayay mitilid, mihapiw to ngangan "misi'ayaw to katalawan a Taywan" (The Taiwan Confrontation Crisis) tilid. :163 Padoedo i 1986 miheca ci Chen Cuiyu misakapot micikeroh to Taywan nikapolongan, fafahiyan todong a patosokan a sakapot "Polong no cikiw fafahiyan Taywan nikapolongan onto" (Women's Movement for Democracy in Taiwan), oni sakapot dengan i "WMDIT", ono Taywan a sowal (tilid) "Tanektekay" sanay ko pitahidang :165 . Padoedo i 1988 miheca ci Chen Cuiyu mihapiw to "Makapahay kanatal nikapolongan-kawaliay Switzerland" a tilidan, laloma' no tilid mihalhal to Taywan pasayra i matiyaay o Switzerland a tenokan kitakit :182-197. I 1987 miheca minokay ci Chen Cuiyu mihapiw ato WMDIT sakapot a haratengan papelo, ato miliso' i Kasiwto a sician marofoay, matiniay demak ni Chen Cuiyu itiyaay a komintang sifo mapacomoday i ciraraway tamdaw, mapalasawad ko sapinokay i Taywan . O pinokay o piliyas to hekal I 1988 miheca o hakal nika saniyaro' no Taywan sarakat i Taywan masa'opo, ci Chen Cuiyu sapinokayan tayni Taywan a mikihatiya, nika o niyah a sapinokay a pitoki mapalasawaday a caay ka nga'ay a minokay, saan o no Amilika a paspoto ko sapisingsi, pakayra to i Singapore milokiyol ta manga'ay minokay tayni i Taywan . Nika o nikato'as to no tatengan, ira ko mimecmecay faloco' a adada ato o pirakarak i 'ayaw no katayni Taywan, ci Chen Cuiyu itiya i 7 folad 31 romi'ad mnokay tayni Taywan tatiihay to ko tatirengan tangsolsol sa mapatayra i Tayta isingan paising, kaitiraan ho i ising i mangalef ko no roma a adada, saka i saka 8 folad 20 romi'adan miliyas to hekal a mapatay. :236 Pipadongosan ci Chen Cuiyu a lihay itira i 8 folad 26 romi'ad itira i Taypisi Congsan nanlo 3 haw Taywan Kristo ciwlo kiwkay (Cinan Kristo ciwlo kiwkay) midemak, itiya pitademan mapatayra i ka'ayaw no miliyangay i Congtongfo ko rakat . Laloma'an Kasofocan ni Chen Cuiyu itira i Canghuasien Hemcen, nano ka'emangan mitoor to mato'asay mikihatiya to Taywan Kristio ciwlo kiwkay Hemi kiwkay, o nano paino'ay to a mala mitooray, ma'emangan ni Chen Cuiyu o mama na kamaenay to masanekay a sasimi malatiihay mapatay o sacecayay a malanaay laloma'an :20-21. O fa'inay ci Eric Landauer o nano maro'ay i Shanghai, cifafahiay to Congko fafahiyan, nao matayalay to hakalan isi sakapot citodongay patadoay a Germany Yotaya a tamdaw. O kasasi'araw nangra aci Chen Cuiyu itiya i 228 a demak a mamakari'ang milayiw saka tayra i Canada i 'ayaw, tayra i Shanghai pacena' ko aro' masasi'araw cangra, itiya ci Eric Landauer padamso ci Chen Cuiyu mipadang :136-137. Ikor nika 1949 miheca komintang sifo komintang kongcantang kalaloodan milaliw ko komintang tayni Taywan, itiyaay ci Eric Landauer saka taynian i Taywan nasa, nika o fafahi paci'eci sa itira i Shanghai a caay pihakolong, nanoya caay to ka parapic. Nanoyaan ci Eric Landauer aci Chen Cuiyu rarid sato maparapic, saka i 1955 miheca mararamod cangra3):138. Tona saka fades tira Tayta kangkofo pitilidan plalw ni Chen Cuiyu papotal no ktakt ma'orip i, ci Eric Landauer malahakelong cangra tayra i Puerto Rico a maro'. O patay ni Eric Landauer itira i 1980 mihecaan miliyas to hekal :141. Pinengneng to tilid

ʦo~u~uijo~u~u matəfo~uʦ no~u ħo~ujin mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u tajaɾ maro~ufo~u :***. taħaiko~ur taɾaʦo~uwa mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u takarawaj ħo~ujin ko~u kaawa no~u raraw a waʦaj ni ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u, nika mapasəmər ʦiŋra saka miɾijas to~u tajwan tajra i paɬ~ɮaka . o~uja tajta kaŋko~ufo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan i piɾijas to~u ni ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u mapaħərək ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan . papo~utaɾaj no~u kitakit a o~unto~u maɾijaw ħaʦa ʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u to~u tajwan tajra i sasifo~uʡaj no~u amiɾika, o~u pipaɬ~ɮaŋ no~u ħakaɾ isi sakapo~ut ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u itiraaj kitakit a isi ko~umo~uŋ, ħaɾafin ko~u aro~uʡ niŋra itira i po~u~uərto~u riʦo~u . itira i ħakaɾ isi sakapo~ut a pataɬ~ɮo~u ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan, o~u sapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a tajaɾ ɾəkakawa ʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~uan taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj pikiħatija to~u papo~utaɾaj no~u kitakit a kasaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj sakapo~ut o~unto~u :***, nika itiraaj i po~u~uərto~u riʦo~u a finawɾan misaʡiʦəɾ to~u sapisiikəɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak saka ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ miʦo~ukər to~u misatataɬ~ɮaj patirəŋ to~u kitakit no~u tajwan . **** miħəʦa nai ħakaɾ isi sakapo~ut a misawaɬ~ɮ ko~u tajaɾ, ʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u misitapaŋ mikiħatija no~u tajwan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a ɬ~ɮəmak, ato~u mikiħatija to~u tajwan sanijaro~uʡ kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan jo~ufajo~uf :***-***. itija i **** miħəʦa ato~u i ħawaii ko~u ao~uʡ ʦi ko~u*əo~ur*i masasiparapiʦ, papitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u pakajniaj to~u tajwan ɾikisi a tiɾiɬ~ɮan, itija ʦi ko~u*əo~ur*i tatiiħ to~u ko~u tirəŋ niŋra a ʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u ko~u miko~utajaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, miħapiw to~u ŋaŋan "misiʡajaw to~u kataɾawan a tajwan" (tħə taiwan ʦo~unfro~untatio~un ʦrisis) tiɾiɬ~ɮ. :*** paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u i **** miħəʦa ʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u misakapo~ut miʦikəro~uħ to~u tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan, fafaħijan to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a pato~uso~ukan a sakapo~ut "po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʦikiw fafaħijan tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan o~unto~u" (wo~umənʡs mo~ub~vəmənt fo~ur ɬ~ɮəmo~uʦraʦj in taiwan), o~uni sakapo~ut ɬ~ɮəŋan i "wmɬ~ɮit", o~uno~u tajwan a so~uwaɾ (tiɾiɬ~ɮ) "tanəktəkaj" sanaj ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ :*** . paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u i **** miħəʦa ʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u miħapiw to~u "makapaħaj kanataɾ nikapo~uɾo~uŋan-kawaɾiaj swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ" a tiɾiɬ~ɮan, ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ miħaɾħaɾ to~u tajwan pasajra i matijaaj o~u swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ a təno~ukan kitakit :***-***. i **** miħəʦa mino~ukaj ʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u miħapiw ato~u wmɬ~ɮit sakapo~ut a ħaratəŋan papəɾo~u, ato~u miɾiso~uʡ i kasiwto~u a siʦian maro~ufo~uaj, matiniaj ɬ~ɮəmak ni ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u itijaaj a ko~umintaŋ sifo~u mapaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj i ʦirarawaj tamɬ~ɮaw, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u sapino~ukaj i tajwan . o~u pino~ukaj o~u piɾijas to~u ħəkaɾ i **** miħəʦa o~u ħakaɾ nika sanijaro~uʡ no~u tajwan sarakat i tajwan masaʡo~upo~u, ʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u sapino~ukajan tajni tajwan a mikiħatija, nika o~u nijaħ a sapino~ukaj a pito~uki mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj a ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj a mino~ukaj, saan o~u no~u amiɾika a paspo~uto~u ko~u sapisiŋsi, pakajra to~u i siŋapo~urə miɾo~ukijo~uɾ ta maŋaʡaj mino~ukaj tajni i tajwan . nika o~u nikato~uʡas to~u no~u tatəŋan, ira ko~u miməʦməʦaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ato~u o~u pirakarak i ʡajaw no~u katajni tajwan, ʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u itija i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mno~ukaj tajni tajwan tatiiħaj to~u ko~u tatirəŋan taŋso~uɾso~uɾ sa mapatajra i tajta isiŋan paisiŋ, kaitiraan ħo~u i isiŋ i maŋaɾəf ko~u no~u ro~uma a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, saka i saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan miɾijas to~u ħəkaɾ a mapataj. :*** pipaɬ~ɮo~uŋo~usan ʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u a ɾiħaj itira i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itira i tajpisi ʦo~uŋsan nanɾo~u * ħaw tajwan kristo~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj (ʦinan kristo~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj) miɬ~ɮəmak, itija pitaɬ~ɮəman mapatajra i kaʡajaw no~u miɾijaŋaj i ʦo~uŋto~uŋfo~u ko~u rakat . ɾaɾo~umaʡan kaso~ufo~uʦan ni ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u itira i ʦaŋħo~u~uasiən ħəmʦən, nano~u kaʡəmaŋan mito~uo~ur to~u mato~uʡasaj mikiħatija to~u tajwan kristio~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj ħəmi kiwkaj, o~u nano~u paino~uʡaj to~u a maɾa mito~uo~uraj, maʡəmaŋan ni ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u o~u mama na kamaənaj to~u masanəkaj a sasimi maɾatiiħaj mapataj o~u saʦəʦajaj a maɾanaaj ɾaɾo~umaʡan :**-**. o~u faʡinaj ʦi əriʦ ɾanɬ~ɮao~u~uər o~u nano~u maro~uʡaj i sħaŋħai, ʦifafaħiaj to~u ʦo~uŋko~u fafaħijan, nao~u matajaɾaj to~u ħakaɾan isi sakapo~ut ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj pataɬ~ɮo~uaj a *ərmanj jo~utaja a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u kasasiʡaraw naŋra aʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u itija i *** a ɬ~ɮəmak a mamakariʡaŋ miɾajiw saka tajra i ʦanaɬ~ɮa i ʡajaw, tajra i sħaŋħai paʦənaʡ ko~u aro~uʡ masasiʡaraw ʦaŋra, itija ʦi əriʦ ɾanɬ~ɮao~u~uər paɬ~ɮamso~u ʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋ :***-***. iko~ur nika **** miħəʦa ko~umintaŋ sifo~u ko~umintaŋ ko~uŋʦantaŋ kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan miɾaɾiw ko~u ko~umintaŋ tajni tajwan, itijaaj ʦi əriʦ ɾanɬ~ɮao~u~uər saka tajnian i tajwan nasa, nika o~u fafaħi paʦiʡəʦi sa itira i sħaŋħai a ʦaaj piħako~uɾo~uŋ, nano~uja ʦaaj to~u ka parapiʦ. nano~ujaan ʦi əriʦ ɾanɬ~ɮao~u~uər aʦi ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u rariɬ~ɮ sato~u maparapiʦ, saka i **** miħəʦa mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ʦaŋra*):***. to~una saka faɬ~ɮəs tira tajta kaŋko~ufo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan pɾaɾw ni ʦħən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u papo~utaɾ no~u ktakt maʡo~urip i, ʦi əriʦ ɾanɬ~ɮao~u~uər maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ ʦaŋra tajra i po~u~uərto~u riʦo~u a maro~uʡ. o~u pataj ni əriʦ ɾanɬ~ɮao~u~uər itira i **** miħəʦaan miɾijas to~u ħəkaɾ :***. pinəŋnəŋ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ
S.FORM: == Cen Cuiyu == Cen Cuiyu (1917 miheca 2 folad 9 romi'ad – 1988 miheca 8 folad 20 romi'ad), pacimil a ngangan ci Rencing , aniniay Taywan kangkoho kiwiko a patirengay, masofoc i Canghua no Taywan a mala kangkohoay ato cisalongocay no finawlan sician onto tamdaw, o nai pikihatiya to pipatireng to Taywan daykako isingan kangkohopo, Taywan daykako kangkoho pitilidan, ta misafa'eloh i naikoran no kalalood Taywan kangkoho kiwiko a pifalic, nanoya, micikeroh patireng to salongoc a harateng "Polong no cikiw fafahiyan Taywan nikapolongan onto" (Women's Movement for Democracy in Taiwan) a kasawasil, ato mihapiw micoker to malatenokay Taywan kitakit sanay a sasowalan. O kacitaneng ningra katadamaan i isingan no Taywan a sarakatay minanam i daykako citamohong to kakosi no Taywan a kangkoho, ato sa'ayaway matahidang no hekalan isi kasawasil a Taywan a kangkoho tamdaw . Rayray no 'orip Ka'emangan Namisawad i Canghua kaucong i, kona awaay ho ko pasayraan no harateng to ikor i, saan na miliso' tayra ko faki i Xiamen; manengneng ko itiraay i Xiamen ko caayay ka korac ko liyok no niyaro', ta miketon pasiisi ko nisafaloco'an a dademakan . Ikor, tayra i Dipon ci Cen Cuiyu itira i Saint Luke fafahiyan kangkofo pitilidan, misawad i 1941 miheca itiya, o nika fangcal no nipitilid ni Cen Cuiyu mafana' saka lalicay to no Dipon ato Inkiris a sowal, saka mafo'ot padoedo itira i Dipon patadoay ko tayal, saan kana'ayen ningra to sapi nokayan tayni Taywan patadoay ko tayal ; midotoc to pipalita no citodongay i congtongfo, ci Cen Cuiyu nai 1942 miheca 1 folad tangasa 12 folad itira i Aiyu no Tokyo mikingkiway to kakomodan isi kangkofo Ka'ayaw kaikor no 228 a demakan Tono pinokay ni Cen Cuiyu tayni Taywan itira cingra i Pawcienkoan no Taypi a matayal , 1945 miheca 11 folad itira to cingra i Taywansio Taypi isingan kangkofo nicokeray kakeridan , toya mihecaan 3 folad mihayda ci Chen Yi to sapiocor a analal . Midotoc to sowal na Qiu Feixian aci Chen Cuiyu a sito ci Li Jinrongan i, 1947 miheca 2 folad fangafang k Taywan to 228 a demak, finawlan ato komintang a tapang masasi'ayaw itiya, saan ci Cen Cuiyu mipadang cingra to mamakari'angaw no citodongay tapang no komintang a papinapina tamdaw, nika ikor patodongen no citodongay pacomod i papatayen a ngangan ci Cen Cuiyu. Ikor ira ko caayay ka kahi a widang ato citodongay midemak a mipadangay, saka toya mihecaan saka 3 folad mipacarcar papiliyas to Taywan ci Cen Cuiyu a tayra i Canada milimek :27 . Midotoc to pipalita no citodongay i congtongfo, 1947 miheca 4 folad ci Chen Cuiyu citodong haca cingra to Taywansio pinanaman komod a malasingsi tanfasa toya miheca 9 folad . Itiya ci Chen Cuiyu i 1947 miheca 9 folad tangasa 1948 miheca 6 folad mitilid i daykako no Toronto no Canada to kangkofo citodongay kiwikoka pakaala to kompay , ikor minokay tayni Taywan cingra padoedo matayal i Taypi isingan kangkofo micokeray tangasa 1949 miheca 1 folad, toya miheca 2 folad patiko tayra i Pawcienkoan no Taypi a matayal to kangkofo kakeridan tangsa 12 folad, toya saka 7 folad mala citodongay no kitakit Taywan daykako isingkakoyin patirengan ising kangkofo kakeridan . Tawan daykako kangkofo pitilidan I 'ayaw no kacitodong ni Chen Cuiyu to kakeridan no kangkofo nao minanamay to kiwikono Padaka; misitapang to saki Tayta isingan ato kangkofo a kiwiko ato sapifalic to lalekoen, halo pipatireng to Tayta isingan kangkofopo, misafaeloh mitelek to patodong no matayalay a kasasiiked no isingan, paisingan taliyok isi kacakat, patongal to kafoti'an no kasofocan ato wawa a rawang masafa'eloh ko kahiraan lalekoen a demak :39-45 Ikoran tiya a Tayta kakeridan ci Fu Sinian kociw mahemek to 'icel ni Chen Cuiyu, nanoya ci Chen Cuiyu i 1950 miheca patireng to kitakit Taywan daykako isi kakoyin pakapi to takaraway kangkofo tayal pitilidan (Tayta fosiw), patorod cingraan sa'ayaway kociw , 1950 miheca 7 folad miteka ci Chen Cuiyu citodong mala liciciw no Taywanko kangkofo konghuy . 1951 miheca komintang miocor tayra i Tayta kangkofo pitilidan malaciawkoan ci Liu Shuzhang fafahiyan; nawhani no tekedan a demak pacomoden ko no sofitay ato teked pikowan i pitilidan, tahaikor caay to kasasinga'ay aci Chen Cuiyu ko harateng :92 . 1952 miheca 10 folad ci Chen Cuiyu mala kapolongan wiyin no Conghua fafahiyan miliyangay to kongcantang , 1954 miheca tayra cingra i Boston daykako no Amilika pakaala to kangkofo dademakan sosi a todong :138. Ikor i 1956 miheca ci Liu Shuzhang mitakaw mitahidang to mangahay tilid, mimangah ci Chen Cuiyuan pakokot to mikelot a raraw, nanoya ci Chen Cuiyu matefoc no hoyin mapalasawad ko tayal marofo :124. Tahaikor talacowa mapalasawad to no takaraway hoyin ko kaawa no raraw a wacay ni Chen Cuiyu, nika mapasemer cingra saka miliyas to Taywan tayra i Padaka . Oya Tayta kangkofo pitilidan i piliyas to ni Chen Cuiyu mapaherek ko kacitodong no pitilidan . Papotalay no kitakit a onto Maliyaw haca ci Chen Cuiyu to Taywan tayra i sasifo'ay no Amilika, o pipadang no hakal isi sakapot citodong to itiraay kitakit a isi komong, halafin ko aro' ningra itira i Puerto Rico . Itira i hakal isi sakapot a patado ira ko 18 mihecaan, o sapatodong a tayal lekakawa ci Chen Cuiyuan talacowa caay pikihatiya to papotalay no kitakit a kasacitodongay sakapot onto :160, nika itiraay i Puerto Rico a finawlan misa'icel to sapisiikedan a demak saka cifaloco' micoker to misatataday patireng to kitakit no Taywan . 1980 miheca nai hakal isi sakapot a misawad ko tayal, ci Chen Cuiyu misitapang mikihatiya no Taywan citodongay nikapolongan a demak, ato mikihatiya to Taywan saniyaro' kakomodan yofayof :160-161. Itiya i 1985 miheca ato i Hawaii ko ao' ci Kogeorgi masasiparapic, papitilid to pakayniay to Taywan likisi a tilidan, itiya ci Kogeorgi tatiih to ko tireng ningra a ci Chen Cuiyu ko mikotayay mitilid, mihapiw to ngangan "misi'ayaw to katalawan a Taywan" (The Taiwan Confrontation Crisis) tilid. :163 Padoedo i 1986 miheca ci Chen Cuiyu misakapot micikeroh to Taywan nikapolongan, fafahiyan todong a patosokan a sakapot "Polong no cikiw fafahiyan Taywan nikapolongan onto" (Women's Movement for Democracy in Taiwan), oni sakapot dengan i "WMDIT", ono Taywan a sowal (tilid) "Tanektekay" sanay ko pitahidang :165 . Padoedo i 1988 miheca ci Chen Cuiyu mihapiw to "Makapahay kanatal nikapolongan-kawaliay Switzerland" a tilidan, laloma' no tilid mihalhal to Taywan pasayra i matiyaay o Switzerland a tenokan kitakit :182-197. I 1987 miheca minokay ci Chen Cuiyu mihapiw ato WMDIT sakapot a haratengan papelo, ato miliso' i Kasiwto a sician marofoay, matiniay demak ni Chen Cuiyu itiyaay a komintang sifo mapacomoday i ciraraway tamdaw, mapalasawad ko sapinokay i Taywan . O pinokay o piliyas to hekal I 1988 miheca o hakal nika saniyaro' no Taywan sarakat i Taywan masa'opo, ci Chen Cuiyu sapinokayan tayni Taywan a mikihatiya, nika o niyah a sapinokay a pitoki mapalasawaday a caay ka nga'ay a minokay, saan o no Amilika a paspoto ko sapisingsi, pakayra to i Singapore milokiyol ta manga'ay minokay tayni i Taywan . Nika o nikato'as to no tatengan, ira ko mimecmecay faloco' a adada ato o pirakarak i 'ayaw no katayni Taywan, ci Chen Cuiyu itiya i 7 folad 31 romi'ad mnokay tayni Taywan tatiihay to ko tatirengan tangsolsol sa mapatayra i Tayta isingan paising, kaitiraan ho i ising i mangalef ko no roma a adada, saka i saka 8 folad 20 romi'adan miliyas to hekal a mapatay. :236 Pipadongosan ci Chen Cuiyu a lihay itira i 8 folad 26 romi'ad itira i Taypisi Congsan nanlo 3 haw Taywan Kristo ciwlo kiwkay (Cinan Kristo ciwlo kiwkay) midemak, itiya pitademan mapatayra i ka'ayaw no miliyangay i Congtongfo ko rakat . Laloma'an Kasofocan ni Chen Cuiyu itira i Canghuasien Hemcen, nano ka'emangan mitoor to mato'asay mikihatiya to Taywan Kristio ciwlo kiwkay Hemi kiwkay, o nano paino'ay to a mala mitooray, ma'emangan ni Chen Cuiyu o mama na kamaenay to masanekay a sasimi malatiihay mapatay o sacecayay a malanaay laloma'an :20-21. O fa'inay ci Eric Landauer o nano maro'ay i Shanghai, cifafahiay to Congko fafahiyan, nao matayalay to hakalan isi sakapot citodongay patadoay a Germany Yotaya a tamdaw. O kasasi'araw nangra aci Chen Cuiyu itiya i 228 a demak a mamakari'ang milayiw saka tayra i Canada i 'ayaw, tayra i Shanghai pacena' ko aro' masasi'araw cangra, itiya ci Eric Landauer padamso ci Chen Cuiyu mipadang :136-137. Ikor nika 1949 miheca komintang sifo komintang kongcantang kalaloodan milaliw ko komintang tayni Taywan, itiyaay ci Eric Landauer saka taynian i Taywan nasa, nika o fafahi paci'eci sa itira i Shanghai a caay pihakolong, nanoya caay to ka parapic. Nanoyaan ci Eric Landauer aci Chen Cuiyu rarid sato maparapic, saka i 1955 miheca mararamod cangra3):138. Tona saka fades tira Tayta kangkofo pitilidan plalw ni Chen Cuiyu papotal no ktakt ma'orip i, ci Eric Landauer malahakelong cangra tayra i Puerto Rico a maro'. O patay ni Eric Landauer itira i 1980 mihecaan miliyas to hekal :141. Pinengneng to tilid
S.PHON: == ʦən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u == ʦən ʦo~u~uijo~u~u (**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), paʦimiɾ a ŋaŋan ʦi rənʦiŋ , aniniaj tajwan kaŋko~uħo~u kiwiko~u a patirəŋaj, maso~ufo~uʦ i ʦaŋħo~u~ua no~u tajwan a maɾa kaŋko~uħo~uaj ato~u ʦisaɾo~uŋo~uʦaj no~u finawɾan siʦian o~unto~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u nai pikiħatija to~u pipatirəŋ to~u tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u isiŋan kaŋko~uħo~upo~u, tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u kaŋko~uħo~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, ta misafaʡəɾo~uħ i naiko~uran no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ tajwan kaŋko~uħo~u kiwiko~u a pifaɾiʦ, nano~uja, miʦikəro~uħ patirəŋ to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a ħaratəŋ "po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʦikiw fafaħijan tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan o~unto~u" (wo~umənʡs mo~ub~vəmənt fo~ur ɬ~ɮəmo~uʦraʦj in taiwan) a kasawasiɾ, ato~u miħapiw miʦo~ukər to~u maɾatəno~ukaj tajwan kitakit
